deepDive.interviewDesc: Our simulator reproduces real interview scenarios adapted to your role and industry. Receive immediate feedback on your answers.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Real stories of transformation
testimonials.t1Text: I didn't know how to build my CV without experience. MoonJab guided me step by step and the RIASEC diagnostic helped me understand which roles suited me best.
testimonials.t2Text: I practiced interviews with AI until I felt confident. In my first real interview, I responded with a confidence I had never had before.
testimonials.t3Text: I used guest mode first to try it out. Within a week I subscribed because the opportunity matching showed me positions that truly aligned with my profile.

categories.careerDiagnosisDesc: Understand how the RIASEC test works
categories.interviewSimDesc: Get the most out of your practice sessions

faqs.q1: How does the career diagnosis work?
faqs.a1: Our diagnosis uses the RIASEC model (Holland Codes), a scientifically recognized framework used worldwide by the U.S. Department of Labor. You'll answer 42 questions about your interests and preferences, and receive a personalized profile with your Holland code along with career recommendations that best match your professional personality.
faqs.q2: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
faqs.a2: Yes, you can cancel your subscription anytime from Settings > Subscription. No penalties, no questions asked. Your access will continue until the end of the current billing period. If you cancel within the first 7 days, you'll receive a full refund.
faqs.q3: How do I export my CV to PDF?
faqs.a3: Once you've created your CV in the editor, simply click the "Export" button in the upper right corner. Your CV will automatically download in PDF format, optimized for ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems) and ready to send to employers.
faqs.a4: Yes, all opportunities come from verified sources like LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor and other recognized job platforms. Each opportunity includes a direct link to apply at the original source.
faqs.q5: How does the interview simulator work?
faqs.a5: Our simulator generates 10 realistic questions based on the position, experience level, and job description you provide. You can answer via text or video. Our AI analyzes your answers and gives you detailed feedback on content, structure, and specific areas for improvement.
faqs.q6: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a6: We accept all major cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and in some countries bank transfer. All payments are processed securely through Stripe.
faqs.a7: Yes, we offer 50% off for students with a verified .edu email. Contact us at moonjab.com@gmail.com with your institutional email to get your discount code.
faqs.a8: Absolutely. We use bank-level encryption (256-bit SSL), secure cloud storage, and we never sell or share your personal information. We comply with GDPR and data privacy best practices.

contact.liveChatDesc: Talk to our AI voice assistant. Available 24/7.
contact.emailDesc: Write to us and we'll respond within 24 business hours.

about.heroDesc: MoonJab was born from a universal frustration: finding the ideal job shouldn't be such a confusing process. We decided to change that.
about.missionText: "Democratize access to world-class professional development tools, so every person can discover and reach their full potential."
about.valuesSubtitle: Four principles that guide every decision

values.clarityDesc: We believe every person deserves to understand exactly what their ideal path is. No confusion, no noise.
values.empathyDesc: We build for real people with real fears and aspirations. Every feature is born from listening.
values.actionDesc: Dreaming isn't enough. We give you the tools to go from idea to result, fast.
values.communityDesc: Success multiplies when shared. We create connections that transform careers.

about.ctaTitle: Want to be part of this story?
about.ctaDesc: Start today and transform your career with MoonJab.

pricing.title: Simple plans, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your goals. Change or cancel anytime.

faqs.q1: Can I cancel at any time?
faqs.a1: Yes. You can cancel your subscription anytime from your settings. No penalties or commitments.
faqs.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a2: We process payments securely through Stripe. We accept Visa, Mastercard and major credit and debit cards.
faqs.q3: What can I do in guest mode?
faqs.a3: You can explore the platform with limited features: 1 CV template, generic opportunities and a basic diagnostic. It's ideal for getting to know MoonJab before subscribing.
faqs.q4: What does the Pro plan unlock?
faqs.a4: Access to all CV templates, unlimited AI interviews, personalized opportunities with match score, complete RIASEC diagnostic, AI coach 24/7 and unlimited PDF export.
faqs.a5: Yes, the subscription renews every month. You can cancel before the next billing date to avoid future charges.
faqs.a6: Absolutely. Your personal data and CVs are protected with encryption. We never share your information with third parties.

pricing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of professionals who already took the first step.
